features.name: sva property with clocked sequence using parallel implication
features.description: Code should include an SVA property that uses a clocked sequence with the parallel implication operator |=>

features.name: sva assertion with sequence on clock edge
features.description: Code should include an SVA assertion that checks a sequence expression on a clock edge using ##1 delay

features.name: sva past function in property expression
features.description: Code should include an SVA property that uses the $past sampling function to access previous cycle values

extraction_summary.note: No explicit code blocks in PR body. Features extracted from AST debug output showing SVA PROPCLOCKED, IMPLICATION, SENITEM, and PAST node structures
